4 
I INTRODUCTION 
 
I.1 Product name  
ARTIC_OMI_SI_extent 
 
I.2 Indicator evaluation method 
Sea ice extent is defined here as the measurement of the area of the ocean covered at least 
by 15% of sea ice. Monthly mean (1993 -2014) seasonal cycle time series of total area for sea 
ice extent are calculated for the northern hemisphere, e.g. Arctic Ocean and Nordic seas 
(excluding ice lakes). Total area monthly time series 1993 -2023 for sea ice extent are 
calculated for the same domain. Sea Ice Extent is expressed here in units of millions of km2. 
I.3 CMEMS products used as input for the computations 
 
Product name (and Type) Documentation 
GLOBAL_MULTIYEAR_PHY_ENS_00
1_031 
QUID : CMEMS-GLO-QUID-001-031.pdf 
PUM : CMEMS-GLO-PUM-001-031.pdf (copernicus.eu) 
 
 
 CMEMS Quality Information Document for 
Arctic Sea Ice Extent 
Issue : 3.0 
2024/11 
 
 
© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public   
5 
II SCIENTIFIC VALIDATION 
More details and full scientific evaluation can be found in the CMEMS Ocean State Report 
(Samuelsen et al., 2016; Samuelsen et al., 2018).  
The quality evaluation of ARCTIC_OMI_SI_extent is  based on the “multi-product” approach as 
introduced in the second issue of the Ocean State Report (CMEMS OSR, 2017). Five global 
products have been used to build the ensemble mean, and its associated ensemble spread 
(Figure 1, dark red line and blue shaded area). Results of Fig. 1 indicate how different products 
compare to each other in view of their mean seasonal cycle and their interannual variability, 
e.g. annual means. 
 
 
Figure 1: Arctic sea ice extent monthly means (Top panel) and annual mean sea ice extent (Bottom panel). Units 
are in millions of km2. Time series are based on different data products, i.e. global ocean reanalysis GLORYS 
(blue), C-GLORS (orange), ORAS5 (green), FOAM (purple) and the ensemble mean (red) and  the ensemble spread 
(light blue). Details on the products are given in the corresponding PUM for this OMI.

catalog_entry.summary: This Quality Information Document evaluates the Ocean Monitoring Indicator for Arctic Sea Ice Extent, detailing its method of calculation and scientific validation based on multiple global ocean reanalysis products.

variables.long_name: Sea Ice Extent defined as the area of ocean covered at least by 15% sea ice.
